description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named deploy that triggers on push events with any tag. Run two parallel jobs on ubuntu-latest: pypi and ghpages. The pypi job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.7, upgrades pip, builds the package, and publishes it to PyPI using a secret password. The ghpages job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.7, installs dependencies, builds the documentation with mkdocs, and publishes it to a GitHub Pages repository using a deploy key.
